'''√r-th-h''' ('''rathaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mactate|mactate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mactate|mactate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-th-h
|-
! Lemma
| rathaha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rathahithi || rathahiji || rathahishi || rathahi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || rathahuthuth || rathahujuj || rathahushush || rathah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || rathahuthu || rathahuju || rathahushu || rathahu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || rathahufuth || rathahufuj || rathahufush || rathahuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rathahethe || rathaheje || rathaheshe || rathahe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rathahothoth || rathahojoj || rathahoshosh || rathah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rathahotho || rathahojo || rathahosho || rathaho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rathahofoth || rathahofoj || rathahofosh || rathahof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rathahïfïf || rathahïfïf || rathahïfïf || rathahïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf || rathahïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rathahæthæ || rathahæjæ || rathahæshæ || rathahæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rathahathath || rathahajaj || rathahashash || rathah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rathahatha || rathahaja || rathahasha || rathaha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rathahafath || rathahafaj || rathahafash || rathahaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || rathahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gorathahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokirathahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || rathahnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gorathahnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokirathahnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || rathahshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gorathahnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokirathahshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || rathahroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gorathahnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokirathahroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || rathahmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gorathahnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokirathahmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || rathahsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gorathahnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokirathahsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || rathahngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gorathahnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokirathahngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || rathahyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gorathahnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokirathahyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || rathahyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gorathahnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokirathahyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || rathahnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gorathahnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokirathahnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || rathahnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gorathahnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirathahnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || rathahnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gorathahnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokirathahnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || rathahshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gorathahnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokirathahshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || rathahshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gorathahnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirathahshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || rathahshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gorathahnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokirathahshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || rathahronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gorathahnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokirathahronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || rathahroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gorathahnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokirathahroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || rathahromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gorathahnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokirathahromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || rathahmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gorathahnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokirathahmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || rathahmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gorathahnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokirathahmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || rathahmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gorathahnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirathahmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || rathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || ræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || horathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || horæthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohorathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohoræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nürathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünürathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïrathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïrathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lurathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulurathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lirathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilirathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || korathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || koræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokorathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokoræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kerathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || keræthæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekerathah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekeræthæh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
